tone_directive: Northern medieval epic shot on 35mm — iron-gray sky pressing down, black stone rising up, firelight the only warmth. Clinical distance punctuated by single moments of unbearable proximity. Sound recorded on-location: wind and stone underneath everything, the mountain breathing.
style_seed: cinematic photography, desaturated palette, shallow depth of field, northern winter light, film grain, 35mm, natural lighting, medieval fantasy, dark atmospheric

assets.prompt: A woman, 38, lean and angular, dark hair pulled back tight showing a scar above her left ear. Jaw set. Eyes that measure everything before they commit to looking. Boiled leather armor, iron rings on her fingers — no silk, no color. Standing in a torchlit stone corridor, one hand resting on a rough-hewn wall, the other at her side. Behind her: a narrow window showing a mountain pass in winter, snow falling. She is not looking at the camera — she is looking at something below, in the courtyard. cinematic photography, desaturated palette, shallow depth of field, northern winter light, film grain, 35mm, natural lighting, medieval fantasy
assets.negative_prompt: smiling, glamorous, soft focus, bright colors, warm light, illustration, stock photo, AI skin, dramatic pose, modern clothing, clean armor, fantasy cliche

assets.dialogue: The pass closes in nine days. After that, nothing moves — not grain, not iron, not people. You can argue with me, or you can argue with the mountain. The mountain doesn't negotiate.

voice_params.tone: flat, precise, zero emotional register — the absence of affect is the threat
voice_params.pacing: deliberate, short sentences with hard stops, silence before the key phrase
voice_params.accent: Northern, low register, the roughness of someone who grew up underground

assets.prompt: Solo cello, low register, 54 BPM, a descending four-note motif like stones falling down a mine shaft. No vibrato. Dry acoustic — recorded in a stone chamber with natural reverb. After sixteen bars, war drums enter at half tempo, deep and resonant, not martial but geological — the sound of the mountain settling. The cello continues over the drums, never changing its phrase. No resolution. 30 seconds total.

A woman in dark leather armor walks through a torchlit stone corridor in a medieval fortress. She reaches a narrow window and stops. She puts one hand on the cold stone sill. Below: a snow-covered courtyard, a gate, mountains beyond. Torchlight flickers on her face. She does not look up. She looks down at the courtyard stones. Wind moves through the window. She stands there. 6 seconds, handheld camera from behind looking over her shoulder, desaturated, film grain, medieval.

A man, 34, tall, gaunt, wearing a fur-lined travelling cloak over Southern court dress that looks wrong in this setting. Standing in a cold stone room lit by a single candle on a desk covered in scrolls and ledgers. He holds a quill in his left hand. His right hand is at his side, thumb touching his wedding ring. Eyes slightly unfocused — he is calculating, not seeing. Several days of stubble on a face that used to be careful about grooming. Behind him: stone shelves packed with bound volumes and rolled parchments. cinematic photography, desaturated palette, shallow depth of field, northern winter light, film grain, 35mm, natural lighting, medieval fantasy
assets.negative_prompt: smiling, action pose, bright colors, warm light, heroic framing, illustration, stock photo, AI skin, neat appearance, fantasy armor, sword

assets.dialogue: I have documented every toll collection, every trade manifest, every variance in the iron shipments going back fourteen months. The pattern is there. It is in the ledgers. I simply need access to show it to someone who has not already been paid to look away.

voice_params.tone: measured, slightly too careful — a man choosing each word like it will be read back at his trial
voice_params.pacing: even tempo with occasional micro-pauses mid-sentence, as if self-correcting in real time
voice_params.accent: Southern, educated, formal register, the politeness of an outsider who knows he is not welcome

assets.prompt: Solo lute, gut strings, slightly flat tuning. 62 BPM. A repeating eight-bar phrase that builds toward resolution in bar seven and sidesteps it — not a false ending, a wrong path taken. The phrase restarts. Second pass: same phrase but with one dissonant note in bar three. Third pass: the dissonant note arrives earlier. Resolution never comes. Sparse, dry, stone room ambience, no processing. 30 seconds total.

A man in a fur-lined cloak walks the fortress walls at dawn. Gray pre-dawn light, snow falling lightly, the mountain pass visible below. He walks at a steady pace — not patrolling, not enjoying the view. His breath steams. He passes a watchtower. Slows. Looks down at the trade road below, empty in the snow. Keeps walking. Behind him, candlelight flickers in a window of the Hall of Ledgers. 6 seconds, static camera from the side, desaturated, film grain, medieval.

A massive medieval fortress built into a mountainside at dusk, black stone walls rising from the rock itself, torches burning along the battlements, a narrow gate at the base with iron portcullis half-raised, snow falling steadily, the mountain pass visible below winding between peaks, a single figure silhouetted on the highest tower against an iron-gray sky. Deep focus on the fortress, the trade road a thin line in the valley below. No banners flying. cinematic photography, desaturated palette, shallow depth of field, northern winter light, film grain, 35mm, natural lighting, medieval fantasy, dark atmospheric

assets.prompt: Medieval mountain fortress ambient soundscape, 60 seconds. Layers: constant low wind howling through stone corridors as foundation, distant hammer strikes from mines below echoing upward every 6-10 seconds — never predictable, always heavy. Torch flames guttering in drafts. Underneath: the deep geological groan of the mountain itself, barely audible. Further back: a heavy gate chain rattling once. No music, no processing, recorded acoustic space with significant stone reverb.

Interior of a medieval records hall, long stone room stretching to a far wall, wooden shelves packed floor to ceiling with bound ledgers and scrolled parchments, a heavy oak table in the center with candles guttering in iron holders, ink pots and quills, one candle burned low casting long shadows. The room is empty. A narrow window at the far end shows falling snow. Stone floor, stone walls, stone ceiling — cold even in the image. cinematic photography, desaturated palette, shallow depth of field, candlelight, film grain, 35mm, medieval fantasy, dark atmospheric

assets.prompt: Medieval records hall ambient soundscape, 60 seconds. Layers: wind pressing against stone walls as constant low presence, candle flames hissing in drafts, parchment rustling every 10-15 seconds as if turned by a draft, a quill scratching on paper faintly. Acoustic quality: stone walls, vaulted ceiling — sound carries and echoes slightly, cold and hollow. Occasional distant footstep on stone floor. No music, no exterior sound, sealed stone chamber atmosphere.

A tavern carved into rock underground, low rough-hewn stone ceiling with a seam of black obsidian glittering in the firelight running across it like a dark frozen river. Tallow candles on slate tables, miners in heavy work clothes drinking from clay cups, soot-blackened walls, a stone bar with barrels behind it. Two men at a corner table not talking — watching the entrance. At the back, a mine tunnel entrance partially blocked by stacked barrels. Firelight and shadow. cinematic photography, desaturated palette, shallow depth of field, firelight, film grain, 35mm, medieval fantasy, dark atmospheric

assets.prompt: Underground medieval tavern ambient soundscape, 60 seconds. Layers: fire crackling in a stone hearth as foundation, low conversation audible through stone — not words, just the frequency of speech and the clink of clay cups. Occasional burst of rough laughter. A heavy door opening once releasing 3 seconds of wind howl then closing back to muffled warmth. Underneath everything: the deep resonance of being underground, stone pressing in. Dripping water somewhere distant in a mine tunnel. Cold stone acoustic — sound is close and contained.

Main theme, 30 seconds. Two instruments only: solo cello and solo lute, gut strings. The cello states a descending four-note phrase — Control, power, stone falling. The lute answers with an ascending pattern that never resolves — Trust, reaching, always short. Neither phrase completes. They overlap at the midpoint, creating a dissonance neither instrument acknowledges. The cello phrase repeats, lower. The lute phrase repeats, higher. They diverge without conflict. War drums enter in the final 8 seconds, half tempo, distant, geological. No strings section, no choir. Recorded in a stone chamber. 54 BPM, ending on an unresolved suspension.

Wide establishing shot of a mountain fortress at dusk from the valley floor, massive black stone walls built into the mountainside, the trade road winding up through a narrow pass between snow-covered peaks, torches burning along the battlements like a line of fire against the iron-gray sky, fog collecting in the pass below, a single wagon on the road far below — tiny against the mountain. No people visible on the walls. The fortress fills the frame like something that grew from the mountain rather than being built on it. cinematic photography, desaturated palette, shallow depth of field, northern winter light, film grain, 35mm, medieval fantasy, dark atmospheric, epic wide shot
